response.justification: This is a very strong candidate with a rare and highly relevant profile. Their most recent role explicitly involves building AI-agent infrastructure and tooling for agentic workflows, which is a perfect match for the unique context of this position. They also have proven experience building high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems at scale. While the lack of explicitly mentioned Python experience is a concern, their polyglot background, deep systems knowledge, and demonstrated ownership make them an exceptional candidate worth interviewing immediately.
strengths: Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq.
Proven experience building high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Exceptional ownership and initiative, demonstrated by founding GISCollective and maintaining numerous open-source projects.
concerns: Python is a 'must-have' skill for the role but is not listed anywhere on the resume.
The current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq is listed with a future start date (April 2025), which requires clarification.
The name on the resume (Aisha Okonkwo) does not match the name in the contact details and personal links (Szabo Bogdan), indicating a clerical error.
